sections.paragraph:
i.q. שֹׁוא-

(1) to make a noise, used of the waves, the tumult of people, see שָׁאֹון , שֵׁת .

(2) to make a crash, as a house falling down; hence to be laid waste, Isa 6:11, init.

Niphal.-

(1) to make a noise, used of the waves and troops of soldiers, Isa 17:12, 13 Isa 17:13.

(2) to be laid waste, of a land, Isa 6:11.

Hiphil, to lay waste, inf. לְהַשְׁאֹות Isa 37:26 whence without לַהְשֹׁות א 2Ki 19:25.

Derivatives, שַׁאֲוָה, שָׁאֹון, שְׁאִיָה, שֵׁאת.

II.

שאה

i.q. שָׁעָה to look at, to behold, not used in Kal.

Hithpael, הִשְׁתָּאָה id. Gen 24:21 followed by לְ. LXX. καταμανθάνω. Vulg. contemplor.
